Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s=fs.readFileSync\('pages/pizzerie/index.tsx','utf8'\); let d=0,c=0,p=0,inStr=false,inTpl=false,quote='',lastLn=1,ln=1; for\(let i=0;i<s.length;i++\){const ch=s[i]; if\(ch==='\\n'\)ln++; if\(inStr\){if\(ch==='\\\\\\\\'\){i++;continue;} if\(ch===quote\)inStr=false; continue;} if\(inTpl\){if\(ch==='\\\\\\\\'\){i++;continue;} if\(ch==='\\`'\)inTpl=false; continue;} if\(ch==='\\`'\){inTpl=true;continue;} if\(ch===\\"'\\"||ch==='\\"'\){inStr=true;quote=ch;continue;} if\(ch==='{'\)c++; else if\(ch==='}'\)c--; else if\(ch==='\('\)p++; else if\(ch==='\)'\)p--; else if\(ch==='['\)d++; else if\(ch===']'\)d--; } console.log\('braces:',c,'parens:',p,'brackets:',d\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\), 'deployments'\); [print\(x['sha'][:8], x['environment'], x['created_at']\) for x in d[:3]]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(j.length,'deployments'\); j.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.sha.slice\(0,8\), x.environment, x.created_at\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(j.length,'statuses'\); j.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.state, '::', x.description, '::', x.target_url\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',d.slice\(0,200\)\);}}\);")
